title: Govern AI-ready infrastructure
summary: This course teaches how to govern AI-ready infrastructure with Microsoft Foundry by enforcing policies, secure access, managing costs, regulating model behavior, and monitor compliance through practical, real-world governance scenarios.

sections.title: Govern AI-ready infrastructure
sections.summary: This course teaches how to govern AI-ready infrastructure with Microsoft Foundry by enforcing policies, secure access, managing costs, regulating model behavior, and monitor compliance through practical, real-world governance scenarios.

lessons.title: Explore AI governance for AI ready infrastructure
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to govern AI workloads using Microsoft Foundry by enforcing policies, managing costs, ensuring compliance, and applying responsible AI guardrails through hands‑on governance scenarios and exercises.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-ai-governance-ai-ready-infrastructure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore AI governance for AI ready infrastructure

lessons.title: Govern AI ready workloads with Microsoft Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Learn to govern AI workloads using Microsoft Foundry by enforcing policy‑driven controls, securing identity access, monitoring compliance, and managing model lifecycle, quotas, and costs through practical, hands‑on exercises.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/govern-ai-ready-workloads-microsoft-foundry/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Govern AI ready workloads with Microsoft Foundry

lessons.title: Run governed AI workloads with Microsoft Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Implement enterprise AI governance with Microsoft Foundry by understanding the governance framework, configuring policy‑driven controls, enforcing quotas and safeguards, and applying hands‑on exercises to balance compliance, security, cost management, and innovation.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/run-governed-ai-workloads-microsoft-foundry/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Run governed AI workloads with Microsoft Foundry

lessons.title: Apply governance controls to AI-ready workloads
lessons.content_md:
Discover classify AI assets enforce Azure Policy guardrails track data lineage and implement hands‑on governance controls securing compliant auditable AI deployments across infrastructure pipelines and sensitive data workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/apply-governance-controls-ai-ready-workloads/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Apply governance controls to AI-ready workloads

lessons.title: Protect and govern AI ready infrastructure with Azure
lessons.content_md:
Design and deploy governed AI infrastructure by understanding governance frameworks, enforcing policies and access controls, implementing responsible AI safeguards, and completing hands-on exercises to ensure compliant, secure AI workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/protect-govern-ai-ready-infrastructure-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect and govern AI ready infrastructure with Azure

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Govern AI-ready infrastructure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Govern AI-ready infrastructure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
